description_long: This object is a set of five compact, rectangular wooden cabinets or shelves, each featuring a simple, utilitarian design suitable for urban environments such as offices, schools, or public waiting areas. The cabinets have a light brown wood finish with visible grain, and each unit is supported by four metallic legs, giving them a slightly elevated stance. Some of the cabinets have open shelving, while others include a single door or a drawer, providing a mix of open and closed storage options. The metallic components, likely made of steel or aluminum, add structural stability and a modern touch. The handles and hinges are minimalistic, blending into the overall design. The overall construction appears sturdy, with flat tops that can support additional objects or serve as temporary work surfaces.
description: A group of five compact, light brown wooden cabinets or shelves with metallic legs, featuring a mix of open shelves, doors, and drawers. The design is modern and functional, suitable for urban public or office settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelves, doors, and drawers, with metallic legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and thickness of the cabinets, with the metallic legs and side panels in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back panels of the cabinets, with minimal visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the side profiles and metallic legs.
